exportStep.title: Export Results
exportStep.description: Download your FMEA review results in various formats
exportStep.note: No data is stored on our servers. The review is generated on-the-fly from your input. You can re-download as long as your session is active (24h).
exportStep.languageDialogDesc: Choose the language for your export

fmeaInfo.heroDesc: Upload your existing FMEA. The system automatically checks it against AIAG/VDA 5th Edition, validates every Action Priority value, and delivers a structured PDF report with prioritised recommendations.
fmeaInfo.outputPdfDesc: A concise review summary with validation status, AP mismatches, data gaps, and audit-ready follow-up points.
fmeaInfo.outputExcelDesc: A traceable workbook export that preserves source context and marks findings for engineering follow-up.
fmeaInfo.disciplinesTitle: FMEA checks built for real workbooks
fmeaInfo.disciplinesSub: Review AIAG/VDA structure, Action Priority logic, parsing confidence, and export evidence without rebuilding your FMEA from scratch.
fmeaInfo.d1Desc: Checks all mandatory fields against AIAG/VDA 5th Edition requirements. Completeness Score shown as a percentage — calculated at field level, not row level.
fmeaInfo.d2Desc: Compares every AP value against the official AIAG/VDA lookup table (S / O / D). Any mismatch is flagged as a Critical finding. 100% accuracy — no S×O×D multiplication.
fmeaInfo.d3Desc: All deviations are prioritised by severity (Critical / High / Medium / Low) and returned with concrete recommendations — ready to act on before your next audit.
fmeaInfo.d4Desc: Professionally formatted report with Executive Summary, Completeness Score, AP Compliance Score, and full finding list. Ready to forward to QM management or auditors.
fmeaInfo.d5Desc: Your original FMEA file is returned with an additional review column per row (OK / Gap / Missing / Non-Compliant). Editable directly — no re-upload needed.
fmeaInfo.d6Desc: This tool does not create a new FMEA. It reviews your existing one. Upload as .xlsx, result delivered in under 60 seconds.
fmeaInfo.howTitle: From Upload to Export in 3 Steps
fmeaInfo.step1Desc: Add the existing .xlsx workbook from your team or supplier.
fmeaInfo.step2Desc: Check AP mismatches, structure gaps, parser notes, and rule violations.
fmeaInfo.step3Desc: Download the executive PDF summary and annotated Excel review output.
fmeaInfo.pricingSub: Buy only what you need. Each completed FMEA review uses one credit, with no subscription required.
fmeaInfo.pricingNote: Each credit unlocks one FMEA review. Credits are delivered by access code after checkout.
fmeaInfo.sampleDesc: See how AP mismatches, missing inputs, parser confidence, and row-level findings are presented for engineering review.
fmeaInfo.faq1Q: Do I need to recreate my FMEA?
fmeaInfo.faq1A: No. The tool reviews your existing FMEA file. Upload your current Excel — the system analyses it and returns a structured report.
fmeaInfo.faq2A: Currently .xlsx (Excel). The system automatically detects the column structure, even if your template uses custom column names.
fmeaInfo.faq3Q: What is the difference between Completeness Score and AP Compliance Score?
fmeaInfo.faq3A: Completeness measures whether all mandatory fields are filled in. AP Compliance measures whether the AP values entered are correct. Both are shown separately because they require different corrective actions.
fmeaInfo.faq4Q: What exactly is checked against AIAG/VDA 5th Edition?
fmeaInfo.faq4A: Mandatory fields, AP values (via S/O/D lookup table), missing actions for High AP entries, missing responsibilities, missing target dates, and use of the outdated RPN methodology.
fmeaInfo.faq5A: No. Credits purchased are permanently valid and can be redeemed at any time.
fmeaInfo.faq6A: All data is processed on EU servers in compliance with GDPR. Uploaded FMEA files are not stored permanently after the report is generated.
fmeaInfo.finalCtaDesc: Run a structured AIAG/VDA review and export the evidence your team needs for the next checkpoint.
